title: waybill split-manifest (v1)
description: Operator-facing index emitted alongside sub-SBOMs when `waybill sbom scan --split` is invoked. Describes the split so downstream tooling can reason about the emitted file set as a whole. See specs/215-sbom-auto-split/contracts/split-manifest-schema.md for the full contract.

$schema.description: Stable v1 schema-version URL. Consumers key on this to select parser version; future breaking schema changes bump to v2.

waybill_version.description: Which Waybill release emitted this manifest. Value from env!(CARGO_PKG_VERSION) at compile time.

scan_root.description: The --path argument passed to the scan; absolute or repo-relative depending on how the operator invoked waybill. Under WAYBILL_FIXED_TIMESTAMP the path normalizes to <WORKSPACE> for byte-identical output.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of scan start. Under WAYBILL_FIXED_TIMESTAMP equals the fixed value.

total_unique_components.description: Distinct-PURL count across ALL sub-SBOMs. Equals the pre-feature single-SBOM component count when --split were absent. Diagnostic for SC-004 sanity.

shared_dep_count.description: Distinct-PURL count of components appearing in >= 2 sub-SBOMs. Diagnostic; downstream tools MAY use for client-side dedup.

entries.description: One entry per detected workspace member. Sorted lexicographically by subproject_id for deterministic output.

subproject_id.description: Stable operator-visible primary key of the form <slug>.<ecosystem>; matches the sub-SBOM filename prefix. Deterministic function of the subproject's PURL.

root_purl.description: Full PURL of the subproject's root component.

source_dir.description: Subproject source directory relative to scan_root. Empty string if the subproject IS the scan root (rare).

component_count.description: Number of components in this sub-SBOM. Includes the root.

shared_deps_count.description: Number of THIS sub-SBOM's components that also appear in >= 1 sibling sub-SBOM.

files.description: Map of format-name -> relative-filename. Keys drawn from the set of --format identifiers Waybill knows.

additionalProperties.description: Relative filename (no path separators) of a sub-SBOM in this format.
